# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docAfter:
# Technical Spec
## Introduction
This is a technical specification document for a markdown editor, providing detailed information about the features and functionalities of the software. It serves as a guide for developers, administrators, and users to understand how to use and customize the editor effectively.
## Architecture

The system uses three layers.
